view.title: View Vassal Estate {id}
view.reinstallNote: You can reinstall from left menu
view.cpanelNote: Royal control panel needs to be installed on a clean foundation layer install with no modifications. If there is any data it shall be lost.
view.resendWelcomeEmailConfirm: Are you sure you want to resend the welcome carrier pigeon?
view.emailSentMessage: The welcome carrier pigeon has been resent. Check your dovecote.

order.title: Commission Vassal Estate
order.rootPasswordNote: Note: Secret Sigil must contain at least 8 characters, one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, one number, and a special character.
order.subscriptionRenewal: The tribute shall automatically renew after {period} at {cost} until canceled.
order.tosAcknowledgment: By checking this box, you acknowledge that you are commissioning a tribute product that automatically renews and is tithed to the sealed coin you provide today. If you wish to cancel your auto-renewal, you may access the subject portal select the active service and click the Withdraw link or dispatch carrier pigeon to: billing{'@'}interserver.net or use another method outlined in the Terms and Conditions. By checking the box and clicking Present My Commission below, you also acknowledge you have read, understand, and agree to our Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy.
order.tosAgree: I have read the terms above and I agree.

buyIp.title: Additional Garrison Coordinates Addon for your Vassal Estate
buyIp.gotError: By the King's wrath — an error! {text}

buyHdSpace.title: Additional Vassal Estate Drive Space
buyHdSpace.spaceNote: Minimum 1 up to 100GB additional HD space can be commissioned

changeRootPassword.title: Change Vassal Estate Master Sigil
changeRootPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Sigil and Confirm Secret Sigil do not match

changeTimezone.title: Change {module} Sundial Zone
changeTimezone.importantNote1: You should halt your {module} completely before changing the sundial zone.
changeTimezone.importantNote2: Vassal Estate shall be Powered OFF and re-commenced during the process.
changeTimezone.importantNote3: The sundial zone on this page shall always default to America/New_York regardless of what your keep is set to.
changeTimezone.gotError: By the King's wrath — an error! {message}

changeWebuzoPassword.title: Change Webuzo Admin Secret Sigil
changeWebuzoPassword.passwordMismatch: Secret Sigil and Confirm Secret Sigil do not match

reinstallOs.title: Reinstall Foundation Layer
reinstallOs.importantNote1: Re-installing the foundation layer shall delete all data.
reinstallOs.importantNote2: Before re-installing the foundation layer, please take a royal vault backup.
reinstallOs.confirmReinstall: I wish to re-install the Foundation Layer!
reinstallOs.confirmReinstallButton: By Royal Decree — Reinstall Foundation Layer

resetPassword.title: Restore to Original Decree — Vassal Estate Secret Sigil
resetPassword.windowsWarning: Windows secret sigil restoration shall result in an unclean halt. Please consider this a last resort option. Verify in VNC that no updates are currently running. If an update is running VNC shall show: Windows is applying updates, do not shut down. Halting in this state can result in an unbootable keep.
resetPassword.confirmReset: I wish to Restore the Secret Sigil to Original Decree!
resetPassword.resetPasswordButton: Restore Secret Sigil to Original Decree

reverseDns.title: Reverse Herald's Registry
reverseDns.dnsChangeNote: Changes to reverse herald's registry take up to an hour to show up.
reverseDns.gotError: By the King's wrath — an error! {text}

vnc.remoteDesktopDescription: Available only on the Windows Platform. Remote desktop is a swift and convenient way to connect to a vassal manor's desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep1: The Administrator secret sigil must first be set on the Vassal Estate before you can use remote desktop.
vnc.remoteDesktopStep2: Connect with VNC or HTML5 VNC to set your initial secret sigil.
vnc.remoteDesktopNote: For a remote desktop tutorial click
vnc.desktopVncDescription: VNC allows you to connect to the vassal manor's desktop. VNC can be run in the browser or as a stand-alone client. Your garrison coordinates must be granted access before the connection can be established.
vnc.grantIpAccess: Grant Your Garrison Coordinates access to VNC
vnc.grantIpWait: Patience, 2 minutes for the action to complete.
vnc.vncClientNote: You can also retrieve one of the many VNC clients available on the realm. We recommend TightVNC. Connect using your Vassal Estate garrison coordinates. Secret Sigil is not required after your remote garrison coordinates has been granted in step 1.
vnc.connectHtml5: To connect using HTML5 VNC Client:
vnc.html5Note: HTML5 VNC client that runs well in any modern browser including mobile browsers (iOS and Android).

setupVnc.title: Establish VNC
setupVnc.ipToGrant: Garrison Coordinates to grant VNC access
setupVnc.grantAccess: Grant VNC Access to Garrison Coordinates
setupVnc.gotError: By the King's wrath — an error! {text}

backups.title: Manage Vassal Estate Royal Vault Backups

restore.offlineNote: Your castle keep shall be offline while it replaces all your current scrolls with those in the royal vault backup. Please consult the King's Guard with any questions.
restore.loginPasswordLabel: Enter Fealty Secret Sigil to Validate Restoration.
restore.confirmRestore: Do you truly wish to restore this royal vault backup?

trafficUsage.billingNote: This is not used for tithing calculations and is an estimate only based on your virtual supply route cards.
